title: RUSPEPA Wired Christmas Holiday Ribbon - Red with Gold Edges Velvet Ribbon - 38 mm x 22 m Each Roll
features: Made of high-quality materials which are suitable for all your decorating needs never tear or crinkle or unravel. High-quality wired ribbon is easy to manipulate and held shape well, giving the bows a bit more "dimension".
1-1/2-inch wide, approx 38mm, perfect size for bows and adorning projects.
25 yards(22m) length is long enough for holidays: garland around Christmas tree, on door wreath, wrapped Christmas presents.
Red with gold edges velvet ribbon look so beautiful and extra traditional, good for fancy wrapping.

Wired edge is perfect for craft projects, DIY, decoration, holiday gift wrapping and more! Wrap them around chairs, wine bottles, mason jars, gift baskets, vases, tables or chairs! Create bows with them to use as decorations. The decorative possibilities are endless!
description: Made of high quality materials which are suitable for all your decorating needs never tear or crinkle or unravel. High quality wired ribbon is easy to manipulate and held shape well, giving the bows a bit more "dimension". 1-1/2-inch wide, approx 38mm, perfect size for bows and adorning projects. 25 yards(22m) length is long enough for holidays: garland around Christmas tree, on door wreath, wrapped Christmas presents. Red with gold edges velvet ribbon look so beautiful and extra traditional, good for fancy wrapping. Wired edge is perfect for craft projects, DIY, decoration, holiday gift wrapping and more! Wrap them around chairs, wine bottles, mason jars, gift baskets, vases, tables or chairs! Create bows with them to use as decorations. The decorative possibilities are endless!
